title: Warden Girl
description: Changes the appearance and gender of the Warden.
body:
This texture pack changes the appearance and gender of the Warden, giving it a more feminine look while preserving its original animations and behavior.
The design includes subtle model and texture adjustments that enhance its visual style without altering gameplay.

It requires Optifine to work properly, or any other mod that supports CEM (Custom Entity Models) such as EMF (Entity Model Features) and ETF (Entity Texture Features).
It works on Minecraft versions prior to 1.20.
